text: Own the output of review 2026-06-11-04 (lume review, 2026-06-11): land .lume/reviews/2026-06-11-04/ and the captured gap records in history, and triage the findings - 3 proposed workstream(s), 4 direction decision(s), 6 review gap(s). automated self-review (deep adversarial swarm, 8 lenses + per-finding skeptic verification), not external validation.
title: Review 2026-06-11-04: triage and adopt findings
